design_strategy.archetype: The 'Organic & Earthy' Wellness (Trust & Calm) mixed with 'Swiss Medical' (Precision)
design_strategy.visual_style: Modern Clinical with Soft Human Touches. Glassmorphism for depth, high whitespace for clarity.

headings.usage: Main titles, Section headers. Tracking tight.

buttons.primary_class: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

cards.classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl

inputs.classes: h-12 bg-white/50 border-gray-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg

layout_strategies.hero: Asymmetrical Split. Left: Strong Value Prop. Right: Emotional Imagery (Doctor/Patient interaction) with floating glass cards.
layout_strategies.facilities: Bento Grid. Main facility (Ultrasound) takes prominence. X-ray and Consultancy as supporting squares.
layout_strategies.contact: Clean Form on White Card floating over a soft map or abstract medical background.
layout_strategies.footer: Minimalist multi-column. Dark Navy background for contrast.

hero_doctor.alt: Dr. Sanchita consulting a patient with a warm smile

clinic_waiting_area.alt: Sunlit, clean, and welcoming waiting area

implementation_steps: Install 'lucide-react' for icons (Stethoscope, Activity, Calendar, MapPin).
Configure Tailwind colors in `tailwind.config.js` to match the Trust Navy and Compassion Pink palette.
Update `index.css` to import 'Plus Jakarta Sans' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts.
Create a `Navbar` component with a 'Book Appointment' pill button.
Develop the `Hero` section using the Split layout strategy.
Build the `Facilities` section using the Bento Grid layout.
Implement the `ContactForm` using shadcn/ui components (Input, Textarea, Button) styled with the new palette.
Assemble the `Home` page integrating all sections.
universal_guidelines: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., form submission success).
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
No generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients or noise overlays if texture is needed.
Do not use default shadcn card styles; override with the Glassmorphism approach defined above.
Maintain high contrast text for accessibility (White text on Navy, Navy text on Pink).
Micro-animations on scroll (fade-up) using 'framer-motion' (if available) or CSS transitions.
